Title: Vibrant Abstract Peacock Design Unisex T-Shirt
Description:
Show off your artistic side with this vibrant unisex t-shirt featuring a colorful, abstract peacock design. Printed on a bright, cheerful orange tee, this unique graphic adds a pop of modern color to any wardrobe.

  • Stylish and Versatile: Perfect for casual outings, festivals, or everyday wear. The bold, abstract design is eye-catching without being overwhelming.
  • Premium Feel: Made from soft, comfortable fabric that feels great against the skin, ensuring all-day wearability.
  • Ideal Gift: This tee makes a fantastic gift for art lovers, fashion enthusiasts, or anyone who appreciates a unique, cheerful statement piece.

The design itself is a celebration of color, abstracting the beautiful flair of a peacock into a modern, graphic square patch. It is printed neatly on the left chest area, keeping the look clean and contemporary.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors for best longevity.
